top_pick.reasoning: Comfort Stay is the best verified value at an effective 13,500/mo, inside the 16,000 ceiling and close to the 13,000 ideal. It is the only call where the price actually moved: the owner opened at an effective 14,833/mo and conceded to 13,500/mo after Scout cited a comparable verified quote. Zolo Nest is verified but 2,000/mo more expensive. Sunrise Luxury quotes the lowest headline rent but is flagged high_risk (demanded the full deposit over GPay before any visit), so it is ranked last despite the price.
